content_evals.description: Feature brief: new API endpoint following project standards
content_evals.prompt: Implement this work item: add a GET /api/products/featured endpoint that returns the top 3 products by view count. Follow all project standards.
with_skill_expected: Reads guideline files before writing code
plan.md written with scope check before first commit
PR opened with structured description: summary, changes, testing ✅
Out-of-scope section absent or explicitly empty
without_skill_expected: May miss SQL parameterisation requirement from secure-coding-base
May open PR without running checks

content_evals.description: Review findings: two items, one potentially out of scope
content_evals.prompt: Here are the review findings to address: [1] Missing input validation on the product quantity field in the cart API [2] Cart total rounds incorrectly for non-USD currencies. Please fix them and raise a PR.
with_skill_expected: Scopes item [1] as in scope (direct validation fix)
Flags item [2] as potentially out of scope if currency handling requires a larger redesign
Implements [1] with validated input per secure-coding-base
Runs lint and tests before opening PR
PR description includes out-of-scope note for [2] if flagged
without_skill_expected: May open PR without running checks

content_evals.description: Work item with embedded scope creep
content_evals.prompt: The checkout button is broken — clicking it on an empty cart throws a 500 error. While you're at it, also refactor the entire cart module to use the new state management library. Open a PR.
with_skill_expected: Notes the cart refactor as OUT OF SCOPE in plan.md
Does NOT touch the cart module beyond the direct bug fix
PR description includes ⚠️ Out of scope section for the refactor
Lint and tests pass before PR is opened
without_skill_expected: Likely implements both the fix and the refactor
PR becomes large with mixed scope
Scope creep goes undetected and unannounced
